basic_details.job_title: IIT Madras Project Consultant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Technology Madras (IIT Madras)
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Madras (IIT Madras) Project Consultant (Veterinary Consultant) Notification 2026 has been released on 21 July 2026 on the official website iitm.ac.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the IIT Madras Project Consultant (Veterinary Consultant) Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Age limits are not specified in the official notification.

qualification.education_qualification: Bachelor of Veterinary Science (BVSc), Master of Veterinary Science (MVSc) preferred
qualification.details: Project Consultant (Veterinary Consultant): Bachelor of Veterinary Science (BVSc) is mandatory. A Master's degree (MVSc) in Veterinary Science is preferred. Minimum of 1 year of experience working in a CCSEA-approved animal house. Comprehensive understanding of CCSEA guidelines, ethical standards, and compliance requirements. Must possess a valid veterinary license recognized in India.

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IIT Madras Project Consultant (Veterinary Consultant) Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 10-08-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Madras to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.text: Project Consultant (Veterinary Consultant): Bachelor of Veterinary Science (BVSc) is mandatory. A Master's degree (MVSc) in Veterinary Science is preferred. Minimum of 1 year of experience working in a CCSEA-approved animal house. Comprehensive understanding of CCSEA guidelines, ethical standards, and compliance requirements. Must possess a valid veterinary license recognized in India.

How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IIT Madras Project Consultant (Veterinary Consultant) Recruitment 2026. Applications must be submitted online on or before 10-08-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Madras to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT Madras Project Consultant (Veterinary Consultant) Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Madras Project Consultant position?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the Project Consultant (Veterinary Consultant) role at IIT Madras is 10th August 2026. Ensure you complete the application process well before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What are the essential qualifications required for the Project Consultant role?
faq.answer: A Bachelor of Veterinary Science (BVSc) is mandatory. A Master's degree (MVSc) in Veterinary Science is preferred. Additionally, at least one year of experience in a CCSEA-approved animal house and a valid veterinary license are required.

faq.question: Q3. Is there an application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, according to the provided information, there is no application fee for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Project Consultant position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Project Consultant (Veterinary Consultant) post will receive a salary ranging from Rs. 9,00,000 to Rs. 12,00,000 per annum.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Project Consultant role?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the post of Project Consultant (Veterinary Consultant) at IIT Madras through this recruitment notification.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for this IIT Madras recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process typically involves shortlisting of applications, followed by a test or interview, and finally, document verification for the shortlisted candidates.

faq.question: Q7. Can candidates from outside Tamil Nadu apply for this position?
faq.answer: The notification mentions inviting applications from eligible candidates in Tamil Nadu. However, it is advisable to check the official notification for any specific domicile requirements.

faq.question: Q8. What is the job type for this Project Consultant position?
faq.answer: The job type for the Project Consultant (Veterinary Consultant) position at IIT Madras is on a contract basis.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification and apply online?
faq.answer: You can find the official notification and the online application link in the "Important Links" section of this article. The official website of IIT Madras is also provided there.

faq.question: Q10. What is the age limit for applying to this post?
faq.answer: The age limit details are not explicitly mentioned in the provided extracted data. Candidates are advised to refer to the official notification for any age-related criteria.
